name: Take Notes
short_description: Take Notes is a puzzle game set in the near future within a bunker filled with 40 unique puzzles. Prepare yourself for a mind-bending adventure where every puzzle solved brings you one step closer to stopping the unthinkable
detailed_description:
Take Notes

This game presents you with a variety of logic puzzles that require both cleverness and analytical thinking. Each level offers unique challenges that will test your problem-solving skills, observance, and logical reasoning. With its diverse puzzles, this game provides not only great fun but also encourages creative and unconventional thinking. Every solution will bring satisfaction, making this game a perfect choice for all intellectual challenge enthusiasts.

Gameplay

The game features 40 diverse puzzles, each requiring a unique approach.

Bunker

Navigate through the rooms of a mysterious research facility and uncover an untold story.

Story

Something strange happened at the Fusion Energetics research facility. All personnel have disappeared without a trace, and the experimental reactor they were working on has become dangerously unstable. Your mission is to reach the control panel and shut it down before a disaster occurs. As if the situation weren't challenging enough, you'll have to bypass the facility’s puzzling security systems alone.

Good luck!
